version.name: 0.45-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.45-beta Changelog :
+ Selection Enhance: Performance optimizations and decoupled settings within Preferences. + DissolveFolder: Refactored for improved logic and correctness. + New: Added Adaptive Insert Track action. + Create Folder: Bug fixes and performance improvements. + New: Added Report Mono FX functionality. + Project Manager: Removed automatic timestamps during backup; refined UI details.
-- Mantrika Team --2026-03.30
